info.name: Dumble Backend API
info.description:
Complete API for the Dumble fitness platform — all services behind the gateway.

**Setup:** import an environment (Local or Production), set `admin_password`, run **00 · WORKFLOWS → B · Post lifecycle → 1. Login** (or any login) to populate `auth_token`. Collection-level Bearer auth then applies it to every request.

Folders are grouped by resource. The `00 · WORKFLOWS` folder has ordered end-to-end scenarios.

item.name: 00 · WORKFLOWS (run in order)

item.description: Ordered end-to-end scenarios. Set `base_url` + `admin_password` (and `target_user_id` where noted), then Run each sub-folder top-to-bottom. Scripts capture ids/tokens into collection variables automatically.

request.description:
**Auth:** public (no token required).

Creates a participant account and returns a JWT. The test script stores `auth_token`, `refresh_token`, `user_id`.

exec: pm.test("Status is a success code", function () {

request.description:
**Auth:** public (no token required).

Authenticates and stores the JWT in `auth_token` (used by every other request via collection-level Bearer auth).
